iOS Splash Screen Requirements for TruckNav Pro
==============================================

This file documents the required splash screen images for iOS PWA support.
These images will be displayed when the app is launched from the home screen.

IMPORTANT: Actual images need to be created using design tools (e.g., Figma, Photoshop).
The images should feature the TruckNav Pro branding with the blue theme (#2563eb).

Required Splash Screen Images:
------------------------------

1. iPhone 15 Pro Max / 14 Pro Max
   - Filename: splash-iphone-15-pro-max.png
   - Dimensions: 1290 x 2796 pixels (430 x 932 @3x)
   - Device Width: 430px
   - Device Height: 932px
   - Pixel Ratio: 3x
   - Media Query: (device-width: 430px) and (device-height: 932px) and (-webkit-device-pixel-ratio: 3)

2. iPhone 15 Pro / 14 Pro / 13 Pro / 12 Pro
   - Filename: splash-iphone-15-pro.png
   - Dimensions: 1179 x 2556 pixels (393 x 852 @3x)
   - Device Width: 393px
   - Device Height: 852px
   - Pixel Ratio: 3x
   - Media Query: (device-width: 393px) and (device-height: 852px) and (-webkit-device-pixel-ratio: 3)

3. iPhone SE (2nd/3rd generation) / 8 / 7 / 6s
   - Filename: splash-iphone-se.png
   - Dimensions: 750 x 1334 pixels (375 x 667 @2x)
   - Device Width: 375px
   - Device Height: 667px
   - Pixel Ratio: 2x
   - Media Query: (device-width: 375px) and (device-height: 667px) and (-webkit-device-pixel-ratio: 2)

4. iPhone 8 Plus / 7 Plus / 6s Plus
   - Filename: splash-iphone-8-plus.png
   - Dimensions: 1242 x 2208 pixels (414 x 736 @3x)
   - Device Width: 414px
   - Device Height: 736px
   - Pixel Ratio: 3x
   - Media Query: (device-width: 414px) and (device-height: 736px) and (-webkit-device-pixel-ratio: 3)

5. iPad Pro 12.9" (5th/6th generation)
   - Filename: splash-ipad-pro.png
   - Dimensions: 2048 x 2732 pixels (1024 x 1366 @2x)
   - Device Width: 1024px
   - Device Height: 1366px
   - Pixel Ratio: 2x
   - Media Query: (device-width: 1024px) and (device-height: 1366px) and (-webkit-device-pixel-ratio: 2)

Design Guidelines:
-----------------

Background Color: #2563eb (TruckNav Pro Blue)
Logo: Center-aligned TruckNav Pro logo
Text: "TruckNav Pro" in white
Subtitle: "Professional Truck Navigation" in light gray/white
Footer: "by Bespoke Marketing.Ai Ltd" in small text

Safe Area Considerations:
- Keep important content within the safe area
- Account for notches and home indicators on modern iPhones
- Ensure branding is visible and centered

Additional Recommendations:
--------------------------

6. iPhone 14 Plus / 13 / 12 / 11
   - Dimensions: 1170 x 2532 pixels (390 x 844 @3x)
   - Device Width: 390px
   - Device Height: 844px
   - Pixel Ratio: 3x

7. iPhone XS Max / 11 Pro Max
   - Dimensions: 1242 x 2688 pixels (414 x 896 @3x)
   - Device Width: 414px
   - Device Height: 896px
   - Pixel Ratio: 3x

8. iPad Mini / Air
   - Dimensions: 1536 x 2048 pixels (768 x 1024 @2x)
   - Device Width: 768px
   - Device Height: 1024px
   - Pixel Ratio: 2x

Testing:
--------

To test splash screens on iOS:
1. Add the app to home screen via Safari
2. Close Safari completely
3. Launch the app from home screen
4. The splash screen should appear during app load

Note: Splash screens only appear when launching from home screen,
not when opening the PWA in the browser.

Implementation Status:
---------------------

✓ Link tags added to index.html
✓ Media queries configured for all device sizes
⏳ Placeholder images needed (create with design tools)

To create actual splash screen images:
--------------------------------------

Option 1: Use Figma/Sketch
- Create artboards with exact pixel dimensions
- Export as PNG with @1x, @2x, @3x variants
- Ensure color profile is sRGB

Option 2: Use PWA Asset Generator
- Install: npm install -g pwa-asset-generator
- Run: pwa-asset-generator logo.png client/public --splash-only

Option 3: Manual Creation
- Use Photoshop/GIMP with exact dimensions
- Save as optimized PNG
- Test on actual devices

Current Status:
--------------
The HTML link tags are in place in client/index.html.
Placeholder image files need to be created and placed in client/public/.
Until images are created, iOS will show the default white screen during launch.

Copyright Notice:
----------------
TruckNav Pro is patent-protected technology owned by Bespoke Marketing.Ai Ltd
All splash screens must include appropriate branding and copyright notices.
